title: [FLUXED]; Eyes of the Void
description: [In Beta] A mod that incorporates Voidpet Mechanics into Minecraft!
body:
Please keep in mind this mod ~~is still in development~~ sucks and won't be updated.

This mod is kinda 2 mods squashed into one because it was more convenient for me.

## Eyes of the Void:
Adds items and blocks based off Voidpet Garden, Dungeon and Hands of Greed! Some of these items are,
- Void Matter, a mana and currency system.
- Nightmare Fuel, material that drops from Starers that can be turned into Void matter
- Artificial Singularity, machine that turns Nightmare Fuel and Ash into Void Matter
- Ability Totems, uses stored VM to cast magic
- Scarves, cosmetic item that come in many colors and patterns
- Giga Gems, a powerful resource (not useful yet though)
- Machines that use VM to combine and seperate items
- Foam Dummies, a repairable testing dummy that returns damage delt and can equip armor.

## Vortex Project:
Adds weapons, materials and items made for a server I host.
- Charm Chains that allow you to equip more Charms!
- Charms that give you a permanent stat-buff.
- A new dimension, the Shattered Abyss that has Voidstone, an animated decorative block, Shattered Wood, a purple and "noisy" wood type and Shattersteel, only used for Shattersteel Chains at the moment, tools may be made later...
Craftable Legendary weapons tied to certain VM abilites
A bunch of WIP stuff like Dark Matter and EE2 based stuff.
